title: On The Death Of A Young Lady,[1]Cousin To The Author, And Very Dear To Him.
content: On The Death Of A Young Lady, [1] Cousin To The Author, And Very Dear To Him.
meaning:
George Gordon Byron's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "On The Death Of A Young Lady,[1]Cousin To The Author, And Very Dear To Him."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
